Session and Activity library

From inspiring keynotes to interactive demos to exclusive networking mixers – if it’s happening at Google Cloud Next, you’ll find it here. Dive into the full list of sessions and activities and start planning your days.

Sign in to discover everything available to you and save your favorites.

Sessions: Use the Agenda Builder to save your spot at your favorite sessions. If a session you don’t want to miss is already full, show up early – standby seating opens five minutes before the session starts.

Activities: Use your favorites list to catch the demos and experiences you want to attend while you’re in between sessions.
